reviews.review_description: FYI devs, I tried installing your game from the Meta Quest phone app and it failed to start a NEW game everytime. Uninstalled then installed directly from the headset and then it worked fine. Good mechanics and pretty good hand tracking. Lacks story but I imagine that will be better developed before launch.
Even in alpha this game has me coming back, wow this is a rough experience right now but it is fun. I can see this game doing well, all it needs is polish because it is hand tracking and in alpha.
But add motion controller support that's if you don't want to use hand tracking for the gameplay.
I can see a lot with this game I hope the developers keep working on it and adding new features .

If you ever wanted to be able to cast spells with doing hand signs this is the game for you. Probably one of the best hand tracking games I've played. I can't wait to see what other spells you will be able to cast once the game is fully released.

The idea is good and I think it could become a good game and own it's 5 stars.
I would give it 3 stars for now.

The hand tracking is really good with the latest v56 update but the game seems to add a lag to every action. It doesn't feels smooth. Good gesture (like the finger snap) could feels really cool if it was smoother. 

The speech recognition is really bad (at least it doesn't understand me most of the time).

The teleport control is tiring (we need to keep our arm up) and not that fun. 

The movement control works badly for me. The worst, for me, is the fact that it follow our head direction (which works well with a controller since we can still steer it). 
Perhaps making us move in a straight line and removing the ability to change direction while moving could do it. Or something like following the last direction of our right index. Or just completely forgetting the headset and pointing up (with the index) to go backward and down to go forward. 

When our movement is stopped for a cutscene it's sudden and feels like a bug (even if it's not). Some kind of vibration (with an explanation for the first time) or visual indicator would be great.

The fairy becomes really annoying after saying 10 times the same lines in a row. We can see the enemies just fine without her. If she needs to say something before or during combats, it needs to be interesting or funny.

And there's plenty of bugs like enemies getting stuck into the ground.

developer_response.body: Dear Player, thank you so much for your comment! We greatly appreciate your suggestions. We have noticed the issues you mentioned above and are working diligently to improve them now. Please look forward to the EA version. Feel free to join our Discord for more game news, events, and chances to win rewards and game keys! Join the Drakheir Discord: https://discord.gg/VNdD2cmcw2

reviews.review_description:
It's a hand tracking game and I only liked two of those types of games, this might be the third one.

I'm loving the head based locomotion as well 
it just needs to be perfected.
(If perfected this might be better than analog stick locomotion that keeps having controller drifting)

I wish there was an indicator of the HMD coordinates (origin point or something) so you know where to position yourself when you want to stop or go slow because I experienced wanting to stop but was unable to because the place where I thought my head/HMD came from isn't stopping my movement.

I have to switch to the teleport locomotion but it's a pain to keep switching and can be annoying in combat as well.

other than that, I think the game shows promise.

This game takes Zenith VR, makes it free, and makes it better. The hand tracking, amazing. Now I will say some stuff is a little weird like some of the spells are hard to do, but that's how its gonna have to work with a hand tracking game with 10 spells. The movement, brilliant. I was so impressed when I figured out I could move by walking and place and turning my head. It can be a little annoying, as its kinda quick, but still a very cool idea of movement. Anyways, I would 100% recommend trying this game out.
The game is super fun and I really enjoy the hand tracking and I love the rogue mode. The game is a 10/10
probably one of the best games for handtracking ive played in a while cant wait for the full released version

It's like my dream game in VR so far..
Had some bug .on it but for alpha it's still good..
Getting used to the glide movement after a while...
Got stuck and not able to go anywhere of continue the quest on the witch realm when I choose the snap for the ice spell..
Hand tracking for teleporting around barely worked at all

VR brings many new possibilities for freshness to gaming, and here is yet another new thing that managed to surprise me. Doing cool hand motions to cast magic in games in a way that actually works is something that just seemed like it would never be a thing, but here we finally are.

The visual design is great, and the character design is something that stands out from the rest of the Quest 2 games library which is absolutely needed amongst all the sameness.

The movement possibly needs to be fixed though as it was a constant struggle, and I hope it can be done in a way that doesn't restrict the gameplay.

I don't think I've been more excited for an upcoming game in years probably, and that's not an exaggeration.

reviews.review_title: Left hand is bugged, can't do anything
reviews.review_description: Really liked the look of this game however for some reason the left hand which controls everything is backwards making it impossible to do anything, iv tried uninstalling it and reinstalling it but i'm now out of ideas on how to fix the issue. I want to give it 5 stars but until i can actually play it i'm leaving it at 2 stars as the hand tracking appears to be bugged for me

developer_response.body: Hello dear player, we apologize for the inconvenience you've encountered. To provide you with the best possible assistance in resolving this matter, we kindly invite you to join our Discord server and get in touch with our support. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We look forward to solving your issue and providing a better gaming experience for you! https://discord.gg/VNdD2cmcw2
